subcodes.first_line: O ye daughters and sons of the Kingdom! When the proclamation of God was exalted and spread in the East and the West and the souls became attracted to the Words of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء و بنات ملکوت چون ندای حق مرتفع شد و در شرق و غرب انتشار یافت نفوسی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @bringing forth results; fruit, @The Holy Spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @second birth
